title: modpack that is super skibi
description: A modpack that adds or expands  to vanilla minecraft features.
body:
this modpack includes mods that expand on cooking, biomes, structures, storage, and Minecraft's technology. With each of these mods either expanding or upgrading on vanilla features. It also adds more mobs making it a bit more difficult and exciting!
!Note! - this modpack is not meant to extremely modify your game and is made to add or expand on things that could be better in minecraft.
